title: Jamaican Mellow Curry Bowl
description: A flavorful and comforting bowl filled with the spices of Jamaica, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is a plant-based delight that will leave you wanting more.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: firm or soft, whichever you prefer

instructions: In a large pan, heat some oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened.
Add the bell pepper and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the tofu and cook until browned.
Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with some naan bread.
